channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bryson Daily leads No. 19 Army to 27-6 victory over Louisiana Tech in the Independence Bowl
item.description: SHREVEPORT, La. (AP) — Bryson Daily broke the FBS record for touchdowns by a quarterback in a season with 32, running for three scores in No. 19 Army’s 27-6 victory over Louisiana Tech in the Independence Bowl on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: ROY LANG III, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Colorado football fans face a dramatic week across three teams
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado football fans experienced a week filled with high-stakes action, featuring the Denver Broncos chasing a playoff berth and the Colorado Buffaloes and Colorado State Rams battling in bowl games.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Dallas' Naji Marshall gets 4-game suspension, Phoenix's Jusuf Nurkic is banned 3 games for fight
item.description: The NBA suspended Dallas Mavericks forward Naji Marshall for four games and Phoenix Suns center Jusuf Nurkic for three games for their roles in an on-court fight during Friday night's game. Dallas forward P.J. Washington was suspended one game. The suspensions handed down Saturday are without pay.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ahkello Witherspoon makes last-minute interception to preserve Rams' 13-9 win over Arizona
item.description: Ahkello Witherspoon made a diving interception on a deflected pass in the end zone with 37 seconds to play, and the Los Angeles Rams barely maintained command of the NFC West race with a 13-9 victory over the Arizona Cardinals on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Miami teammates fight on sideline during Pop-Tarts Bowl
item.description: A pair of Miami Hurricanes teammates were separated during an altercation Saturday at the Pop-Tarts Bowl against the Iowa State Cyclones in Orlando.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Burrow throws 3-yard TD pass to Higgins in OT as the Bengals beat the Broncos 30-24
item.description: Joe Burrow threw his third touchdown pass to Tee Higgins with 1:07 left in overtime, and the Cincinnati Bengals kept their slim playoff hopes alive with a wild 30-24 win over the Denver Broncos.
item.dc:creator: Mitch Stacy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Notre Dame's Danny Nelson scores twice, defending champ US beats Latvia 5-1 in world junior hockey
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Notre Dame forward Danny Nelson scored twice, Western Michigan’s Hampton Slukynsky made 25 saves and the defending champion United States beat Latvia 5-1 on Saturday in the world junior hockey championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eli Manning and Antonio Gates are among the finalists for the Pro Football Hall of Fame
item.description: Two-time Super Bowl MVP Eli Manning, former Defensive Players of the Year Luke Kuechly and Terrell Suggs, and prolific tight end Antonio Gates are among the finalists for the 2025 Pro Football Hall of Fame class.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL legend Eric Dickerson keeps it brutally honest about Saquon Barkley chasing his rushing record
item.description: Saquon Barkley is 268 yards away from becoming the NFL's single-season rushing record holder, but Eric Dickerson is rooting for Barkley to come up short.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Beyoncé's performance highlighted Netflix's NFL debut on Christmas Day
item.description: Beyoncé provided more excitement than either game during Netflix’s NFL debut on Christmas Day. Riding into her halftime appearance on a white horse, the 32-time Grammy winner rocked her hometown Houston crowd with a nearly 13-minute performance on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Reports: Pete Carroll interested in Bears' head-coaching job
item.description: Former Seattle Seahawks head coach Pete Carroll has expressed interest in becoming the next head coach of the Chicago Bears, who are looking to fill their head coaching vacancy for the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: What to know if you want to follow the Buckeyes to the Rose Bowl
item.description: It will be a warm welcome for Ohio State fans traveling to Pasadena after a frigid December home game at The Shoe.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Beachy, NewsNation
